topic: Web Audio render observability for mobile Safari diagnosis

source_status.primary_source: W3C Web Audio API 1.1 First Public Working Draft, 5 November 2024
source_status.maturity: working draft; feature availability must be detected at runtime

finding.claim: AudioContext.state === 'running' is insufficient evidence that output blocks are progressing. getOutputTimestamp().contextTime provides stronger browser-visible render-position evidence when available; currentTime is a weaker fallback. Physical audibility remains outside browser-only proof.
support: The specification permits initial start to depend on sticky user activation.
getOutputTimestamp returns the sample-frame position currently rendered by the output device and returns zeros before the graph has processed a block.
outputLatency is the specified latency estimate; currentTime minus output timestamp is explicitly not a reliable latency estimate.
Web Audio 1.1 adds feature-detectable diagnostics including renderCapacity and AudioContext error events, but they are draft capabilities and not assumed present.
finding.evidence_strength: standards-derived design implication; device-level audibility still requires runtime/device evidence

falsification.runtime_test: Invoke observeAudioStart immediately inside the same pointer/touch handler that starts sound, then compare the classification with an on-device audible report or hardware/system meter.
failure_conditions: A fake context with advancing output timestamps is not classified render-confirmed.
A running context with no time advance is classified as proof of rendering.
The implementation claims physical audibility solely from browser state.
Unsupported draft features throw instead of being feature-detected.

verification.test_execution: not executed in this connector-only run because no repository checkout or GitHub Actions execution interface was available
verification.device_verification: not performed; handed off to Vercel Studio

privacy: No private chat, personal health data, diagnosis, or treatment content is included.
